# PhageHostLearn external files

This directory is the expected local location for small PhageHostLearn benchmark files retrieved from Zenodo record `10.5281/zenodo.11061100`. The data files themselves are ignored by Git.

Use `phagehostlearn_file_manifest.tsv` to verify local copies before running matrix normalization or map review. Missing files are acceptable in mock/seed workflows and are reported as warnings; present files must match the recorded size, MD5, and SHA-256 checksums.
